capabilities.name: REST API data fetching
capabilities.notes: Configurable endpoints, custom headers, query builders for pagination/filtering/sorting

capabilities.name: Static array / inline data
capabilities.notes: Pass data directly via config or adapter

capabilities.name: LRU caching with TTL
capabilities.notes: Per-table TTL overrides, in-flight request deduplication, auto-invalidation on writes

capabilities.name: Custom data adapters
capabilities.notes: Extend BaseDataAdapter for any data source (Firebase, GraphQL, localStorage)

capabilities.name: CSV API adapter
capabilities.notes: Planned additional adapter for CSV HTTP endpoints

capabilities.name: HTML table rendering from config
capabilities.notes: Builds thead, tbody, pagination, filter UI from config object

capabilities.name: Column render callbacks
capabilities.notes: render(value, row, context) returns string, Node, or null

capabilities.name: Empty state with configurable text
capabilities.notes: emptyText option. Two modes: empty dataset vs. filtered-no-results

capabilities.name: Virtual scrolling
capabilities.notes: Render only visible rows for massive datasets

capabilities.name: Diff-aware re-render
capabilities.notes: Patch changed rows instead of full innerHTML wipe

capabilities.name: <stream-grid> custom element
capabilities.notes: Attribute-driven: src, table, page-size, pagination-mode, filter-mode, sort-mode, template

capabilities.name: <stream-grid-column> declarative columns
capabilities.notes: field, label, sortable, sorter, width, filter, template attributes

capabilities.name: Light DOM rendering
capabilities.notes: No Shadow DOM — standard CSS works. sg- namespaced classes

capabilities.name: element.grid escape hatch
capabilities.notes: Access the underlying StreamGrid instance for programmatic control

capabilities.name: Child-notifies-parent reinit
capabilities.notes: Attribute changes on <stream-grid-column> trigger parent reinit via queueMicrotask

capabilities.name: Declarative DOM column config
capabilities.notes: columns: 'dom' reads <th data-field> from existing markup

capabilities.name: Init-time plugin system
capabilities.notes: plugins: [fn]. Each plugin receives grid instance at construction

capabilities.name: Config export/import
capabilities.notes: exportConfig() returns JSON-safe snapshot for state persistence

capabilities.name: TypeScript / .d.ts files
capabilities.notes: JSDoc is thorough. A build step breaks the zero-dep story

capabilities.name: Framework bindings (React, Vue, Angular)
capabilities.notes: Web Component API works in any framework. No wrapper needed

capabilities.name: CSS-in-JS / theming engine
capabilities.notes: Uses CSS custom properties. Bring your own theme

capabilities.name: Charting / visualization
capabilities.notes: Data table only. Use a charting library alongside
